summary: Iteration 229 — Verified critical Mira widget pet fix. The bug where widget always showed Mojo (pets[0]) instead of active pet is FIXED. Both dual event listeners (petChanged + petSelectionChanged) confirmed in code at lines 444-448 of MiraChatWidget.jsx. localStorage re-sync on widget open confirmed at line 571. Backend stream endpoint correctly returns pet-specific context for both Bruno and Mojo. UI shows correct pet name (Bruno's Soul Mate / Mojo's Soul Mate) based on active pet selection. All 8 pets visible in widget tabs.

integration_issues.issue: When switching pets multiple times in a session, historical 'Switching to X' messages accumulate in chat. Not a bug per se, but could confuse users seeing old Mojo messages when Bruno is active. Chatbot AI response still uses backend-loaded pet context (Bruno) correctly.

action_items: MINOR: Consider clearing chat message history on pet switch within widget to avoid showing stale 'Switching to X' messages from previous switches. This would give a cleaner experience when switching between pets multiple times.
critical_code_review_comments: MiraChatWidget.jsx line 444-448: Both event listeners (petChanged from PillarContext + petSelectionChanged legacy) are correctly present — fix verified
MiraChatWidget.jsx line 571: localStorage re-sync on widget open correctly checks livePetId vs selectedPet.id — fix verified
PillarContext.jsx line 204: dispatches 'petChanged' with full pet object as e.detail — correctly consumed by MiraChatWidget handlePetChange at line 416 (e.type === 'petChanged' ? e.detail : null)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix iteration 229. Critical fix: MiraChatWidget now listens to both 'petChanged' (PillarContext) and 'petSelectionChanged' (legacy). Widget header subtitle dynamically shows '<PetName>'s Soul Mate' based on active pet. Pet tabs in widget show all 8 pets for dipali. Quick chips personalize to active pet name. Backend /api/mira/os/stream correctly loads full pet soul from DB when pet_id is provided.

verification_summary.widget_shows_bruno_header: VERIFIED — 'Bruno's Soul Mate' shown when Bruno is active
verification_summary.widget_shows_mojo_header: VERIFIED — 'Mojo's Soul Mate' shown when Mojo is default
verification_summary.8_pets_in_widget_tabs: VERIFIED — Mojo, Mystique, Bruno, Buddy, Lola, Meister, Luna, Coco all visible
